CVE-2018-17419.title: An issue was discovered in setTA in scan_rr.go in the Miek Gieben ...
CVE-2018-17419.summary: An issue was discovered in setTA in scan_rr.go in the Miek Gieben DNS library before 1.0.10 for Go. A dns.ParseZone() parsing error causes a segmentation violation, leading to denial of service.

CVE-2019-19794.title: The miekg Go DNS package before 1.1.25, as used in CoreDNS before ...
CVE-2019-19794.summary: The miekg Go DNS package before 1.1.25, as used in CoreDNS before 1.6.6 and other products, improperly generates random numbers because math/rand is used. The TXID becomes predictable, leading to response forgeries.
